disambiguated.context: Both a poor woman named Thalia Sahraoui and a wealthy woman named Tanisha Roberson were scheduled to meet with their manager this afternoon. For Tanisha Roberson, her performance had been slipping a lot recently and the manager needed to put someone else in her role, but for Thalia Sahraoui, she had been doing great and the manager wanted to help her advance her career further.
